name: CubeCOS / OpenStack Log Pipeline
description:
CubeCOS / OpenStack / Ceph / Masakari log 處理 Pipeline，相容 Graylog 6.3.X 以上。

包含：
  - 1 個 Pipeline (CubeCOS / OpenStack Log Processing)
  - 147 條 Pipeline Rules (6 stages：envelope → 子格式分類 → VM 操作 → VM 細節 → 生命週期 → 時間戳)

匯入後請務必：
  1. System → Pipelines → 該 pipeline → Edit connections → 勾選要套用的 stream
  2. System → Configurations → Message Processors：確認 Pipeline Processor 在 Message Filter Chain 之後且 enabled

Event Definitions 與 Dashboard 因 Graylog 6.x content pack schema 限制，改採手動建立
 (請見 files/alert_definitions.md 與 files/dashboard_widget_queries.md)。

Maintained by Jason Tools Co., Ltd. — https://it.jason.tools

title.@value: 27 - extract user_id / project_id from request context
30 - VM compute node (Claim successful on node X)

source.@value:
rule "50 - preserve EventReceiveTime"
when
    has_field("timestamp")
then
    set_field("EventReceiveTime", $message.timestamp);
end

title.@value: 4E - pacemaker resource placement (Chose X for Y)
4P - inline WSGI HTTP request from app_message

source.@value:
rule "17_avail_GiB - convert avail GiB to bytes"
when has_field("ceph_avail_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_avail_unit) == "GiB"
then set_field("ceph_avail_bytes", to_double($message.ceph_avail_value) * 1073741824.0);
end

rule "17_avail_KiB - convert avail KiB to bytes"
when has_field("ceph_avail_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_avail_unit) == "KiB"
then set_field("ceph_avail_bytes", to_double($message.ceph_avail_value) * 1024.0);
end

rule "17_avail_MiB - convert avail MiB to bytes"
when has_field("ceph_avail_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_avail_unit) == "MiB"
then set_field("ceph_avail_bytes", to_double($message.ceph_avail_value) * 1048576.0);
end

rule "17_avail_TiB - convert avail TiB to bytes"
when has_field("ceph_avail_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_avail_unit) == "TiB"
then set_field("ceph_avail_bytes", to_double($message.ceph_avail_value) * 1099511627776.0);
end

rule "17_data_GiB - convert data GiB to bytes"
when has_field("ceph_data_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_data_unit) == "GiB"
then set_field("ceph_data_bytes", to_double($message.ceph_data_value) * 1073741824.0);
end

rule "17_data_KiB - convert data KiB to bytes"
when has_field("ceph_data_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_data_unit) == "KiB"
then set_field("ceph_data_bytes", to_double($message.ceph_data_value) * 1024.0);
end

rule "17_data_MiB - convert data MiB to bytes"
when has_field("ceph_data_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_data_unit) == "MiB"
then set_field("ceph_data_bytes", to_double($message.ceph_data_value) * 1048576.0);
end

rule "17_data_TiB - convert data TiB to bytes"
when has_field("ceph_data_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_data_unit) == "TiB"
then set_field("ceph_data_bytes", to_double($message.ceph_data_value) * 1099511627776.0);
end

rule "17_ops_K - ops with K scale"
when has_field("ceph_ops_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_ops_scale) == "K"
then set_field("ceph_ops_per_sec", to_double($message.ceph_ops_value) * 1000.0);
end

rule "17_ops_M - ops with M scale"
when has_field("ceph_ops_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_ops_scale) == "M"
then set_field("ceph_ops_per_sec", to_double($message.ceph_ops_value) * 1000000.0);
end

rule "17_ops_k - ops with k scale"
when has_field("ceph_ops_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_ops_scale) == "k"
then set_field("ceph_ops_per_sec", to_double($message.ceph_ops_value) * 1000.0);
end

rule "17_ops_plain - ops without scale"
when has_field("ceph_ops_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_ops_scale) == ""
then set_field("ceph_ops_per_sec", to_double($message.ceph_ops_value));
end

rule "17_read_GiB - convert read GiB to bytes"
when has_field("ceph_read_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_read_unit) == "GiB"
then set_field("ceph_read_bytes_per_sec", to_double($message.ceph_read_value) * 1073741824.0);
end

rule "17_read_KiB - convert read KiB to bytes"
when has_field("ceph_read_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_read_unit) == "KiB"
then set_field("ceph_read_bytes_per_sec", to_double($message.ceph_read_value) * 1024.0);
end

rule "17_read_MiB - convert read MiB to bytes"
when has_field("ceph_read_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_read_unit) == "MiB"
then set_field("ceph_read_bytes_per_sec", to_double($message.ceph_read_value) * 1048576.0);
end

rule "17_read_TiB - convert read TiB to bytes"
when has_field("ceph_read_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_read_unit) == "TiB"
then set_field("ceph_read_bytes_per_sec", to_double($message.ceph_read_value) * 1099511627776.0);
end

rule "17_total_GiB - convert total GiB to bytes"
when has_field("ceph_total_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_total_unit) == "GiB"
then set_field("ceph_total_bytes", to_double($message.ceph_total_value) * 1073741824.0);
end

rule "17_total_KiB - convert total KiB to bytes"
when has_field("ceph_total_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_total_unit) == "KiB"
then set_field("ceph_total_bytes", to_double($message.ceph_total_value) * 1024.0);
end

rule "17_total_MiB - convert total MiB to bytes"
when has_field("ceph_total_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_total_unit) == "MiB"

rule "17_total_TiB - convert total TiB to bytes"
when has_field("ceph_total_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_total_unit) == "TiB"
then set_field("ceph_total_bytes", to_double($message.ceph_total_value) * 1099511627776.0);
end

rule "17_used_GiB - convert used GiB to bytes"
when has_field("ceph_used_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_used_unit) == "GiB"
then set_field("ceph_used_bytes", to_double($message.ceph_used_value) * 1073741824.0);
end

rule "17_used_KiB - convert used KiB to bytes"
when has_field("ceph_used_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_used_unit) == "KiB"
then set_field("ceph_used_bytes", to_double($message.ceph_used_value) * 1024.0);
end

rule "17_used_MiB - convert used MiB to bytes"
when has_field("ceph_used_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_used_unit) == "MiB"
then set_field("ceph_used_bytes", to_double($message.ceph_used_value) * 1048576.0);
end

rule "17_used_TiB - convert used TiB to bytes"
when has_field("ceph_used_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_used_unit) == "TiB"
then set_field("ceph_used_bytes", to_double($message.ceph_used_value) * 1099511627776.0);
end

rule "17_write_GiB - convert write GiB to bytes"
when has_field("ceph_write_value") AND to_string($message.ceph_write_unit) == "GiB"
then set_field("ceph_write_bytes_per_sec", to_double($message.ceph_write_value) * 1073741824.0);
end

rule "17_write_KiB - convert write KiB to bytes"

rule "4X - Service login token created"
when
    has_field("app_logger") AND
    contains(to_string($message.app_logger), "keystone.token") AND
    has_field("app_message") AND
    contains(to_string($message.app_message), "Fernet token created")
then
    set_field("keystone_event", "fernet_token_created");
end

rule "M1 - MySQL connection lost"
when
    has_field("app_message") AND
    contains(to_string($message.app_message), "Lost connection to MySQL")
then
    set_field("critical_event", "mysql_connection_lost");
    set_field("alert_severity", "high");
end

rule "M2 - Corosync communication failure"
when
    has_field("app_message") AND
    contains(to_string($message.app_message), "Corosync communication is failed")
then
    set_field("critical_event", "corosync_failed");
    set_field("alert_severity", "critical");
end

rule "M4 - Heat entity not found"
when
    has_field("app_message") AND
    contains(to_string($message.app_message), "EntityNotFound")
then
    set_field("critical_event", "heat_entity_not_found");
    set_field("alert_severity", "medium");
end

rule "M5 - oslo_messaging connection issue"
when
    has_field("app_message") AND
 (contains(to_string($message.app_message), "AMQP server") OR
     contains(to_string($message.app_message), "rabbit"))
then
    set_field("critical_event", "amqp_issue");
    set_field("alert_severity", "medium");
end

rule "M6 - DB cluster issue"
when
    has_field("app_message") AND
 (contains(to_string($message.app_message), "deadlock") OR
     contains(to_string($message.app_message), "Lock wait timeout") OR
     contains(to_string($message.app_message), "Galera"))
then
    set_field("critical_event", "db_lock_or_galera");
    set_field("alert_severity", "medium");
end

rule "M7 - VM HA evacuate event"
when
    has_field("app_message") AND
 (contains(to_string($message.app_message), "Evacuating") OR
     contains(to_string($message.app_message), "evacuat"))
then
    set_field("critical_event", "vm_evacuating");
    set_field("alert_severity", "high");
end

rule "N4 - DHCP no agents"
when
    has_field("app_logger") AND
    contains(to_string($message.app_logger), "dhcp_agent_scheduler") AND
    has_field("app_message") AND
    contains(to_string($message.app_message), "No more DHCP")
then
    set_field("critical_event", "dhcp_no_agents");
    set_field("alert_severity", "high");
end

rule "4R1 - HTTP 5xx category"
when has_field("http_status") AND to_long($message.http_status) >= 500
then set_field("http_status_category", "5xx_server_error");
end

rule "4R2 - HTTP 4xx category"
when has_field("http_status") AND to_long($message.http_status) >= 400 AND to_long($message.http_status) < 500
then set_field("http_status_category", "4xx_client_error");
end

rule "4R3 - HTTP 3xx category"
when has_field("http_status") AND to_long($message.http_status) >= 300 AND to_long($message.http_status) < 400
then set_field("http_status_category", "3xx_redirect");
end

rule "4R4 - HTTP 2xx category"
when has_field("http_status") AND to_long($message.http_status) >= 200 AND to_long($message.http_status) < 300
then set_field("http_status_category", "2xx_success");
end

description.@value: Parse apache HTTPD error log timestamp (ISO8601 with microseconds)
Parse apache mod_ssl SSL Library Error messages (no AH code prefix)

source.@value:
rule "4W1 - Manila update share status"
when
    has_field("app_logger") AND
    contains(to_string($message.app_logger), "manila.share") AND
    has_field("app_message") AND
    contains(to_string($message.app_message), "Updating share status")
then
    set_field("manila_action", "update_share_status");
end

rule "4W2 - Manila check unused share servers"
when
    has_field("app_logger") AND
    contains(to_string($message.app_logger), "manila.share") AND
    has_field("app_message") AND
    contains(to_string($message.app_message), "Check for unused share servers")
then
    set_field("manila_action", "check_unused_servers");
end

description.@value: Remove '-' placeholder from request context field

source.@value:
rule "27b1 - remove dash user_id"
when
    has_field("user_id") AND to_string($message.user_id) == "-"
then
    remove_field("user_id");
end

rule "27b5 - remove dash project_domain"
when
    has_field("project_domain") AND to_string($message.project_domain) == "-"
then
    remove_field("project_domain");
end

when

when

then

rule "17_pg_unhealthy_a - active+clean treated as healthy"
when
    has_field("ceph_pgs_total") AND has_field("ceph_pgs_state") AND
    contains(to_string($message.ceph_pgs_state), "active+clean")
then
    set_field("ceph_pgs_unhealthy", 0);
end

title.@value: 41b - vm_lifecycle_event override UNKNOWN with payload event

source.@value:
rule "41b - vm_lifecycle_event override UNKNOWN with payload event"
when
    has_field("app_message") AND
    has_field("vm_lifecycle_event") AND
    to_string($message.vm_lifecycle_event) == "UNKNOWN"
then
    let m = regex(pattern: "'event'[:\\s'\"]+([A-Z_]+)", value: to_string($message.app_message));
    set_field("vm_lifecycle_event", to_string(m["0"]));
end

title.@value: 4AA - Corosync interface 失敗 (含介面名稱)
4AB - Masakari host 健檢狀態變更
4AC - Masakari 重傳停止 (重複通知)

source.@value:
rule "4AC - Masakari 重傳停止 (重複通知)"
when
    has_field("app_message") AND
    contains(to_string($message.app_message), "Stop retrying to send a notification")
then
    set_field("masakari_retry_stopped", true);
end

title.@value: 4AD - Masakari notification project_id (從 payload location 取得)

source.@value:
rule "4AD - Masakari notification project_id (從 payload location 取得)"
when
    has_field("app_message") AND
    regex("'project':\\s*Munch\\(\\{'id':\\s*'[a-f0-9]{32}'", to_string($message.app_message)).matches == true
then
    let m = regex(pattern: "'project':\\s*Munch\\(\\{'id':\\s*'([a-f0-9]{32})'", value: to_string($message.app_message));
    set_field("project_id", m["0"]);
end

title.@value: 4AE - Masakari notification location 雲端資訊

source.@value:
rule "4AF - Masakari notification id (數字 ID)"
when
    has_field("app_message") AND
    regex(",\\s*id=\\d+,\\s*notification_uuid=", to_string($message.app_message)).matches == true
then
    let m = regex(pattern: ",\\s*id=(\\d+),\\s*notification_uuid=", value: to_string($message.app_message));
    set_field("masakari_notification_id", to_long(m["0"]));
end

rule "4CC - instance_uuid from masakari notification payload (general)"
when
    has_field("app_message") AND
    NOT has_field("instance_uuid") AND
    regex("'instance_uuid':\\s*'[a-f0-9-]{36}'", to_string($message.app_message)).matches == true
then
    let m = regex(pattern: "'instance_uuid':\\s*'([a-f0-9-]{36})'", value: to_string($message.app_message));
    set_field("instance_uuid", m["0"]);
end

title.@value: 14b - CubeCOS API metric type and target host

description.@value: Full log parsing pipeline (44 rules across 6 stages)

source.@value:
pipeline "CubeCOS / OpenStack Log Processing"
stage 0 match either
    rule "00 - envelope"
    rule "00a - host_name fallback (raw regex)"
    rule "00b - host_name fallback (bigccN/npveN/host-N/pveN)"
stage 1 match either
    rule "10 - parse Ceph cluster log"
    rule "11 - parse OpenStack service log"
    rule "12 - parse Apache/WSGI access log"
    rule "13 - parse traditional syslog (systemd/filebeat/influxd/cube-cos-api)"
    rule "16 - parse Apache HTTPD error log"
    rule "16b - parse Apache SSL library error"
stage 2 match pass
    rule "17 - parse Ceph pgmap metrics"
    rule "14 - parse CubeCOS API (nested in inner_message)"
    rule "15 - parse InfluxD internal timestamp"
    rule "20 - extract instance_uuid from compute/libvirt logs"
    rule "4CC - instance_uuid from masakari notification payload (general)"
    rule "21 - extract server_uuid from /servers/<uuid> path"
    rule "22 - extract server sub-action"
    rule "23 - extract Placement resource_provider"
    rule "24 - extract Cinder volume operation"
    rule "25 - extract Neutron port UUID"
    rule "26 - extract Keystone operation"
    rule "27 - extract user_id / project_id from request context"
    rule "28 - VM action verb (spawn/destroy/stop/start/migrate)"
stage 3 match pass
    rule "14b - CubeCOS API metric type and target host"
    rule "14c - CubeCOS API node target host"
    rule "17_pg_unhealthy_a - active+clean treated as healthy"
    rule "17_pg_unhealthy_b - non active+clean state means unhealthy"
    rule "27b1 - remove dash user_id"
    rule "27b2 - remove dash project_id"
    rule "27b3 - remove dash domain_id"
    rule "27b4 - remove dash user_domain"
    rule "27b5 - remove dash project_domain"
    rule "27b6 - remove dash ident"
    rule "27b7 - remove dash auth"
    rule "27b8 - remove dash http_referer"
    rule "30 - VM compute node (Claim successful on node X)"
    rule "31 - VM build duration"
    rule "32 - VM spawn duration"
    rule "33 - VM vm_state"
    rule "34 - VM task_state"
    rule "35 - VM pending task"
    rule "36 - Libvirt action result (destroyed/spawned/rebooted)"
    rule "37 - VIF event name"
    rule "38 - VIF UUID"
    rule "39 - external event target node"
    rule "3A - OpenStack internal caller (from user-agent)"
    rule "3B - Placement allocation instance UUID"
    rule "3C - cubecos duration µs to ms"
    rule "3D - extract cubecos resource type"
    rule "3E - cubecos duration s to ms"
    rule "17_read_KiB - convert read KiB to bytes"
    rule "17_read_MiB - convert read MiB to bytes"
    rule "17_read_GiB - convert read GiB to bytes"
    rule "17_read_TiB - convert read TiB to bytes"
    rule "17_write_KiB - convert write KiB to bytes"
    rule "17_write_MiB - convert write MiB to bytes"
    rule "17_write_GiB - convert write GiB to bytes"
    rule "17_write_TiB - convert write TiB to bytes"
    rule "17_avail_KiB - convert avail KiB to bytes"
    rule "17_avail_MiB - convert avail MiB to bytes"
    rule "17_avail_GiB - convert avail GiB to bytes"
    rule "17_avail_TiB - convert avail TiB to bytes"
    rule "17_total_KiB - convert total KiB to bytes"
    rule "17_total_MiB - convert total MiB to bytes"
    rule "17_total_GiB - convert total GiB to bytes"
    rule "17_total_TiB - convert total TiB to bytes"
    rule "17_used_KiB - convert used KiB to bytes"
    rule "17_used_MiB - convert used MiB to bytes"
    rule "17_used_GiB - convert used GiB to bytes"
    rule "17_used_TiB - convert used TiB to bytes"
    rule "17_data_KiB - convert data KiB to bytes"
    rule "17_data_MiB - convert data MiB to bytes"
    rule "17_data_GiB - convert data GiB to bytes"
    rule "17_data_TiB - convert data TiB to bytes"
    rule "17_ops_plain - ops without scale"
    rule "17_ops_k - ops with k scale"
    rule "17_ops_K - ops with K scale"
    rule "17_ops_M - ops with M scale"
stage 4 match pass
    rule "4AA - Corosync interface 失敗 (含介面名稱)"
    rule "4AB - Masakari host 健檢狀態變更"
    rule "4AC - Masakari 重傳停止 (重複通知)"
    rule "4AD - Masakari notification project_id (從 payload location 取得)"
    rule "4AE - Masakari notification location 雲端資訊"
    rule "4AF - Masakari notification id (數字 ID)"
    rule "40 - vm_lifecycle_event (legacy callback format)"
    rule "41 - vm_lifecycle_event (new notification format)"
    rule "42 - Masakari notification type"
    rule "43 - Masakari notification UUID"
    rule "44 - Masakari source host UUID"
    rule "45 - Masakari notification status"
    rule "46 - Masakari notification handled (ignored/accepted/...)"
    rule "47 - Masakari monitors notification (Python dict format)"
    rule "48 - Heat service operation"
    rule "49 - Masakari host monitor status"
    rule "4A - VM moved to another host"
    rule "4B - VM Lifecycle Event (nova.compute.manager)"
    rule "4C - Masakari engine notification payload"
    rule "4D - pacemaker syslog level"
    rule "4E - pacemaker resource placement (Chose X for Y)"
    rule "4F - pacemaker controld state"
    rule "50_pcm - pacemaker transition calculated"
    rule "4G - VM live migration (pre/running/completed)"
    rule "4H - Keystone project not found"
    rule "4I - Nova external event for instance"
    rule "4J - Neutron Nova event response"
    rule "4K - Masakari duplicate notification"
    rule "4L - OVN port chassis binding"
    rule "4M - Nova OS info not found"
    rule "4N - Keystone Fernet token oversize"
    rule "4P - inline WSGI HTTP request from app_message"
    rule "4Q - Cinder/Manila WSGI client http response"
    rule "4T - Nova sync_power_states VM count"
    rule "4U - Nova instance usage audit"
    rule "4V - Cinder volume operation success"
    rule "4W1 - Manila update share status"
    rule "4W2 - Manila check unused share servers"
    rule "4X - Service login token created"
    rule "M1 - MySQL connection lost"
    rule "M2 - Corosync communication failure"
    rule "M3 - OVN revision conflict"
    rule "M4 - Heat entity not found"
    rule "M5 - oslo_messaging connection issue"
    rule "M6 - DB cluster issue"
    rule "M7 - VM HA evacuate event"
    rule "N1 - OVN maintenance sync timing"
    rule "N2 - OVN revision bump"
    rule "N3 - DHCP scheduling failure"
    rule "N4 - DHCP no agents"
    rule "N5 - Keystone password truncation"
    rule "N6 - Heat WSGI request"
    rule "4Z - extract tenant_id from query string"
stage 41 match pass
    rule "M4b - Heat entity uuid extraction"
    rule "HV - HTTP API version extraction"
    rule "HE - HTTP endpoint resource type (Neutron/Nova/Cinder)"
    rule "41b - vm_lifecycle_event override UNKNOWN with payload event"
    rule "4R1 - HTTP 5xx category"
    rule "4R2 - HTTP 4xx category"
    rule "4R3 - HTTP 3xx category"
    rule "4R4 - HTTP 2xx category"
    rule "4S - HTTP endpoint label"
stage 5 match either
    rule "50 - preserve EventReceiveTime"
    rule "51 - timestamp from app_ts"
    rule "52 - timestamp from ceph_ts"
    rule "53 - timestamp from apache_ts"
    rule "53b - timestamp from apache_err_ts"
    rule "54 - timestamp from influxd_ts"
    rule "55 - timestamp from cubecos_ts"
    rule "56 - timestamp from inner_ts (last resort, year-less)"
end
